cc:Agent.dc:title: Original Keyboard Design by omkbd and Original Character Design by TANAKA U

cc:Work.dc:relation: Carving data generate reference: http://inkscapedesign.web.fc2.com/, Data making about order for CNC reference: https://yushakobo.jp/
cc:Work.dc:description: - Text was modify to outline. - Import pictures including. - Document color mode is RGB - Cut lines width: 0.003pt - Order first cut line color: 0xFF0000 - Order second cut line color: 0x0000FF - Order carving fill color: 0x000000
